summary: The user reports that `libmicrohttpd` is still listed in `External-Dependency-Info.txt` in version 3.119.3-preview.1 despite being removed from the codebase in PR #3463. This was observed on Windows with SkiaSharp 3.116.0.

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: File External-Dependency-Info.txt still contains the entry in main branch.

analysis.summary: The file External-Dependency-Info.txt lists `libmicrohttpd` as a dependency, but it has been removed from `externals/skia/DEPS` (commented out) and is not present in `cgmanifest.json`. The metadata file is out of sync with the actual dependencies.

keySignals.text: it still appears in the External-Dependency-Info.txt of latest preview release
libmicrohttpd must be removed from the External-Dependency-Info.txt

analysis.rationale: This is a documentation/metadata bug where the dependency list was not updated after a dependency removal. The issue is confirmed by code investigation.

proposals.title: Remove libmicrohttpd from External-Dependency-Info.txt
proposals.description: Delete the section for ANGLE/libmicrohttpd from External-Dependency-Info.txt as it is no longer used.

resolution.recommendedReason: The dependency is verified to be removed from build configuration.

actionability.reason: Requires a PR to update the text file.

actions.comment: Thanks for reporting this! You are correct, `libmicrohttpd` was removed from the build but the notices file was missed. We will update `External-Dependency-Info.txt` to reflect this change.
